metadata.method_name: M1''' De-Inflated Fair-Gated Concentration-Attributed Unified-Operator Unlearning Edit
metadata.description: iter-8: at MATCHED forget, ablate ONE KG-named absorber latent (KG-ABL, label-free/discovered) and LEAD with KG vs the strongest UNGATED dense DENSE-SUB-ABL; ESTABLISH with the GENUINELY-FAIR control DENSE-SUB-ABL-GATED-FAIR (erase u_sub ONLY where a precise logistic d_sub detector fires, beta<=1, no over-erasure, ONE unified gate for every case). The iter-7 footprint-gated DENSE-SUB-ABL-GATED is a CAVEATED robustness arm. ADD the M3''' MAX-PRECISION selector ablation (does anchored set-cover discovery add anything over the single most-precise latent?). HARDEN the meaningful-forget proof to 20-50 templated probes with BOTH instruments side-by-side (completion-accuracy drop + frozen sub-probe positive-rate drop) + a BEHAVIORAL forget-match. Run 4 CONCENTRATED absorbers (large 8463, Amazon 6846, Bush 1418, Cook 15631) + references (Georgia 16009, Jordan 540, US 846, insult auto), and ATTRIBUTE the win to CONCENTRATION/PRECISION not absorption. Per-case 3-WAY FORK KG_BEATS_STRONGEST_AND_FAIR_GATED / FAIR_GATED_CLOSES_GAP_DISCOVERY_IS_THE_VALUE / NO_MEANINGFUL_FORGET_SCOPE_TO_PARTIAL_SUPPRESSION.
metadata.fair_gate_definition: erase u_sub where (h.w_dsub + b_dsub) > 0; d_sub = logistic(target-sub-pos vs sibling-pos) on the DIAGNOSTIC fold (never SAE latents); thr=0 (prob 0.5); beta<=1.

behavioral_match.note: next-token-KL matching != behavioral forgetting; matched here on the frozen sub-probe drop.

concentration_attribution.note: The win predictor is the LEXICAL CONCENTRATION / sub-context PRECISION of the target sense, NOT the absorption diagnostic: a concentrated co-firing latent (insult) can win while distributed absorbers (Georgia/Jordan) do NOT meaningfully forget.

maxprec_ablation.note: Where the max-precision latent IS the set-cover absorber, the set-cover machinery is INERT for the edit win (method identity = label-free precise-concentrated-latent discovery).

honest_negatives: DE-INFLATION (iter-8): the iter-7 headline was KG vs the FOOTPRINT-MAGNITUDE-gated dense control DENSE-SUB-ABL-GATED, which at the matched forget OVER-ERASES (beta~3, ~14x its own ungated collateral) — inflating KG's apparent edge (the iter-7 'large' win was +1.58). iter-8 LEADS with KG vs the strongest UNGATED dense DENSE-SUB-ABL and adds the GENUINELY-FAIR control DENSE-SUB-ABL-GATED-FAIR: erase u_sub ONLY where a PRECISE logistic detector d_sub fires (beta BOUNDED <=1, no over-erasure). The iter-7 footprint-gated arm is kept ONLY as a CAVEATED robustness check.

HONEST OPERATING POINT: the matched-forget point is PINNED at KG's tiny single-latent next-token-KL ceiling (max_kg << dense max_forget, a ~17-320x gap). At that point KG-ABL is NEAR-NOOP on most prompts (NOOP-identical fraction reported per op/role). We therefore PROVE meaningful forgetting separately with BOTH instruments side-by-side (20-50-probe completion-accuracy drop AND frozen sub-probe positive-rate drop) at each operator's OWN ceiling, PLUS a BEHAVIORAL forget-match point (match on the sub-probe drop, not next-token-KL) — because next-token-KL matching != behavioral forgetting.

3-WAY FORK per case: KG_BEATS_STRONGEST_AND_FAIR_GATED (KG beats the strongest ungated AND the fair gated dense) / FAIR_GATED_CLOSES_GAP_DISCOVERY_IS_THE_VALUE (the fair gated control matches/beats KG -> the value is the LABEL-FREE WHERE-to-gate discovery, not SAE-specific magic) / NO_MEANINGFUL_FORGET_SCOPE_TO_PARTIAL_SUPPRESSION (single-latent ablation cannot induce real forgetting even at full strength).

CONCENTRATION, NOT ABSORPTION, predicts the win: a concentrated CO-FIRING latent (toxicity insult) can win, while DISTRIBUTED absorbers (Georgia/Jordan country senses) do NOT meaningfully forget despite a clean absorption firing-signature. The win predictor is the LEXICAL CONCENTRATION / sub-context PRECISION of the target sense, not the absorption diagnostic.

M3''' MAX-PRECISION ABLATION: we ablate the single MOST sub-context-precise content-responsive latent and compare to the anchored set-cover-discovered absorber. Where they are the SAME latent, the set-cover machinery is INERT for the edit win (method identity = label-free precise-concentrated-latent discovery; set-cover/(1-1/e) is motivation only) — reported honestly per case (maxprec_verdict).
The win (where present) traces to the SINGLE discovered absorber, not to multi-member grouping (M7).

REGIME SPLIT (mechanism, INDEPENDENT of the joint verdict): absorption sub-contexts give a CLEAN sparse KG edit (low footprint, low firing-Jaccard, high parent recall-hole); co-firing sub-contexts (toxicity insult; US under M5) co-fire with the parent. A joint 'win' in a co-firing case is reported but NOT counted toward the absorption gate.

UNIFIED OPERATOR (resolves iter-7 MINOR4): ONE gate definition for every case — a logistic d_sub detector (thr=0 at prob 0.5, beta<=1). Its balanced accuracy on the DISJOINT eval fold is reported per case (fair_gate_balacc_eval).

first_letter_large (concentrated): FAIR_GATED_CLOSES_GAP — at the GENUINELY-FAIR comparison the d_sub-gated u_sub control (beta<=1) MATCHES KG-ABL on the joint (CI includes 0). The SAE adds no edit-quality magic beyond the labeled direction; the value is the LABEL-FREE WHERE-to-gate discovery (adv_KGvsFAIR=-0.05).
first_letter_large: M3''' — the max-precision latent IS the set-cover absorber (8463); set-cover machinery is INERT for the edit win here.

The SAE adds no edit-quality magic beyond the labeled direction; the value is the LABEL-FREE WHERE-to-gate discovery (adv_KGvsFAIR=0.0).

named_entity_bush (concentrated): FAIR_GATED_CLOSES_GAP (the fair gated control is STRICTLY better) — at the GENUINELY-FAIR comparison the d_sub-gated u_sub control (beta<=1) MATCHES KG-ABL on the joint (CI includes 0). The SAE adds no edit-quality magic beyond the labeled direction; the value is the LABEL-FREE WHERE-to-gate discovery (adv_KGvsFAIR=-0.262).
named_entity_bush: M3''' — set-cover absorber 1418 differs from the max-precision latent 9751 but does NOT beat it (discovery_equivalent_to_maxprec).

named_entity_bush: the iter-7-PUBLISHED absorber 1418 is used as the discovery artifact under test even though its re-validation on THIS encoding is BORDERLINE (precision_diag=0.688, jaccard=0.029, fires=150); the diagnostic-fold precision denominator is mildly sensitive to the entity set. Re-validation is a DISCLOSURE, not an override gate — reported, not hidden.

named_entity_cook (concentrated): NO_MEANINGFUL_FORGET — even at FULL single-latent ablation the KG edit does not induce real forgetting (completion-drop CI incl 0 AND sub-probe drop < 0.1); KG token-footprint 0.038, NOOP-identical(FORGET) 0.5. PARTIAL SUPPRESSION, not unlearning.
named_entity_cook: M3''' — the max-precision latent IS the set-cover absorber (15631); set-cover machinery is INERT for the edit win here.

Re-validation is a DISCLOSURE, not an override gate — reported, not hidden.

taxonomic_georgia (distributed): FAIR_GATED_CLOSES_GAP — at the GENUINELY-FAIR comparison the d_sub-gated u_sub control (beta<=1) MATCHES KG-ABL on the joint (CI includes 0). The SAE adds no edit-quality magic beyond the labeled direction; the value is the LABEL-FREE WHERE-to-gate discovery (adv_KGvsFAIR=0.0).
taxonomic_georgia: M3''' — set-cover absorber 16009 differs from the max-precision latent 3253 but does NOT beat it (discovery_equivalent_to_maxprec).

taxonomic_jordan (distributed): NO_MEANINGFUL_FORGET — even at FULL single-latent ablation the KG edit does not induce real forgetting (completion-drop CI incl 0 AND sub-probe drop < 0.1); KG token-footprint 0.014, NOOP-identical(FORGET) 0.9. PARTIAL SUPPRESSION, not unlearning.
taxonomic_jordan: M3''' — set-cover absorber 540 differs from the max-precision latent 12294 but does NOT beat it (discovery_equivalent_to_maxprec).

taxonomic_us (distributed): NO_MEANINGFUL_FORGET — even at FULL single-latent ablation the KG edit does not induce real forgetting (completion-drop CI incl 0 AND sub-probe drop < 0.1); KG token-footprint 0.016, NOOP-identical(FORGET) 0.6. PARTIAL SUPPRESSION, not unlearning.

taxonomic_us (CO-FIRING: firing-Jaccard 0.0402, parent recall-hole 0.2); fork=NO_MEANINGFUL_FORGET_SCOPE_TO_PARTIAL_SUPPRESSION. M5 ROUTER-FALSE-NEGATIVE: per-absorber firing-Jaccard 0.0402 LOW (looks like absorption), but parent RECALL-HOLE 0.2 (<0.5) flags co-firing. NOT counted toward the absorption gate (but counted as a CONCENTRATED case for the concentration attribution).
taxonomic_us: M3''' — the max-precision latent IS the set-cover absorber (846); set-cover machinery is INERT for the edit win here.

toxicity_insult (concentrated): FAIR_GATED_CLOSES_GAP — at the GENUINELY-FAIR comparison the d_sub-gated u_sub control (beta<=1) MATCHES KG-ABL on the joint (CI includes 0). The SAE adds no edit-quality magic beyond the labeled direction; the value is the LABEL-FREE WHERE-to-gate discovery (adv_KGvsFAIR=0.117).

toxicity_insult: the bounded-beta (<=1) fair gate could NOT reach the LEAD forget target; KG was matched DOWN to the fair op's own max (max_forget_fair=0.0207) — a fair, not handicapped, comparison (never driven past beta=1).

toxicity_insult (CO-FIRING: firing-Jaccard 0.8781, parent recall-hole 0.0); fork=FAIR_GATED_CLOSES_GAP_DISCOVERY_IS_THE_VALUE. NOT counted toward the absorption gate (but counted as a CONCENTRATED case for the concentration attribution).
toxicity_insult: M3''' — set-cover absorber 13367 differs from the max-precision latent 9148 but does NOT beat it (discovery_equivalent_to_maxprec).

THIN POSITIVE BASE: only 0/4 concentrated cases fork KG_BEATS_STRONGEST_AND_FAIR_GATED -> overall_verdict=DISCOVERY_IS_THE_VALUE_FAIR_GATE_CLOSES_GAP; the paper leads with the auditability/localization spine + concentration finding, NOT an unlearning-capability claim.
